song.title: A Final Hyperbase - Enigma [hyperbased lug00ber remix]
A Final Hyperbase - Enigma [Hyperbased 'Enjoy the POKEY' 2xAtariXL mix]

oneliner.message: goodnight, always a pleasure, serp, well, sometimes  <3
oneliner.author: mirrorbird

oneliner.message: places that had brits in them tend to drive left
oneliner.author: mirrorbird

oneliner.message: yeah Malta is a curious archaeological place
oneliner.author: mirrorbird

oneliner.message: a boring/cool fact, Maltese is i think the only language with double x in it.  because it's basically semitic/arabic written in Latin.  (apologies to some native american languages with rare orthography and 3 dying speakers)
oneliner.author: mirrorbird

oneliner.message: in malta they drive left and they have those bick white stones on buildings
oneliner.author: serppi

comments.comment: This one is about two minutes too long.

This track is just droning noise like https://hypr.website/song/43597

it doesn't really work without the visuals.
hyper long silence at the end of this one.
a little harsh on the ear
a little harsh on the ear
Seems like this is from a Kummeli skit.
I was waiting for the "my name is Giovanni Giorgio, but everybody calls me Giorgio" part...
